sql_array: CREATE TABLE size_test (id UInt32, readable_size String, size UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO size_test (id, readable_size) VALUES (1, '2 KiB'), (2, '500 B'), (3, '1 MiB');
UPDATE size_test SET size = parseReadableSize(readable_size) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, readable_size, parseReadableSize(readable_size) AS parsed_size FROM size_test WHERE parsed_size > 512;
INSERT INTO size_test (id, readable_size) SELECT id + 3, formatReadableSize(size) FROM size_test WHERE id < 3;
